svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif
svg.title: Hyperflow — 9-layer multi-agent orchestration
svg.desc: A complete map of Hyperflow: project analysis, autonomy, model routing, orchestrator dispatching parallel workers, brainstorming for design, quality gates, persistent session memory, task templates, automated git workflow, and security containment — across Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, Codex, and Antigravity.

g.text: 9 layers · Thinking model orchestrates · Workers execute in parallel · Every output reviewed · Memory persists
↻ Learnings injected into next batch (within session)
• Tailwind v4 uses CSS variable tokens, not config
• All validation goes through zod schemas in src/shared/
Pre-built decomposition patterns · auto-selected, adapted to context
Trigger: "add X management" · "create API for X" · "fix X" · "extract X into Y"
Push waits for you · main is sacred
✓ Reviewer scans for secrets in diffs
github.com/Mohammed-Abdelhady/hyperflow · MIT · Plain markdown skill, no runtime network calls
